title: Biome Definition
description: Contains a description and components to define a Biome.

components.title: Components
components.description:
Components for this Biome.

Properties:
• minecraft:climate (object)
• minecraft:creature_spawn_probability (object)
• minecraft:humidity (object)
• minecraft:map_tints (object)
• minecraft:mountain_parameters (object)
• minecraft:multinoise_generation_rules (object)
• minecraft:overworld_generation_rules (object)
• minecraft:overworld_height (object)
• ... and 6 more properties

description.title: Description
description.description:
Non-component settings, including the Biome name.

Properties:
• identifier (string)

defaultSnippets.label: Biome Description
defaultSnippets.description: Contains non-component settings for a Biome.
